provenance: Sanitized from an installed VibeTether 0.6.3 project shape supplied for compatibility review, with the canonical v0.6.3 Truth Map sections and control pointers retained.
privacy: Project names, goals, evidence, paths, and user prose were replaced while preserving the v0.6.3 schema and lifecycle structure.
limitations: This fixture is not a byte-identical clone of a private user project and contains no credentials or private data. Live release compatibility is separately exercised by scripts/test-live-v063-migration.mjs when network acquisition is authorized.
